name: HA MCP
description: Deploys the official Home Assistant MCP Server (ha-mcp) in HTTP mode via uvx. Provides a LAN MCP endpoint for Cursor and other HTTP-capable AI clients to control Home Assistant through natural language.

notes.text: During install you will be prompted for a Home Assistant URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8123) and a long-lived access token (HA Profile → Security → Create Token). The script verifies HA connectivity before starting the service.
HTTP mode on port 8086 with an auto-generated MCP_SECRET_PATH. Do not expose this port to the internet without a reverse proxy.
Home Assistant OS users may prefer the official MCP Server add-on. This script is for Container/Core or standalone LXC deployments.

Cursor: add the MCP URL printed at install to ~/.cursor/mcp.json — e.g. {"mcpServers":{"home-assistant":{"url":"http://<container-ip>:8086/mcp-<secret>/mcp"}}}. Restart Cursor and confirm in Settings → MCP. See https://github.com/homeassistant-ai/ha-mcp for details.
Update an existing container: run `update` inside the LXC, or `pct exec <CTID> -- update` from the Proxmox host.
Retrieve the MCP endpoint anytime: `pct exec <CTID> -- cat /opt/ha-mcp/mcp_endpoint.txt`

HA and this LXC should be on the same LAN/VLAN. Test connectivity from inside the container: `curl -sf -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN" http://YOUR_HA_IP:8123/api/`. Use http:// unless HTTPS is configured. Regenerate the token if revoked.
Service status — Debian: `systemctl status ha-mcp` and `journalctl -u ha-mcp -n 50`. Alpine: `rc-service ha-mcp status` and `tail -50 /var/log/ha-mcp.log`.

Alpine template: run `pveam update`, then `pveam available --section system | grep alpine-3.23`. Download if missing: `pveam download local alpine-3.23-default_20260116_amd64.tar.xz` (use the exact name from `pveam available` on your arch). Fallback: `var_version=3.22` if 3.23 is not listed on an older Proxmox host.
Debian 13 and Alpine installs enable nesting and keyctl by default (Debian: systemd compatibility; Alpine: Docker and tunnel agents).
